description_for_human: Access company profiles, deal data, investor information, funding rounds, and ownership data from PitchBook.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to retrieve company profiles, M&A and PE deal data, investor information, funding round history, board member details, and ownership structures from PitchBook. Ideal for private company research, venture capital analysis, and deal sourcing.

functions.name: get_company_profile
functions.description: Retrieve a comprehensive company profile from PitchBook including financials, investors, and deal history.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol for public companies (e.g., AAPL)

company_name.description: Company name for private companies (e.g., Stripe, SpaceX)

functions.name: get_deals
functions.description: Retrieve deal history for a company including M&A, PE, and VC transactions.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol or company name

deal_type.description: Type of deal: ma, pe, vc, ipo, or all

role.description: Company role in deal: target, acquirer, investor, or all

functions.name: get_investors
functions.description: Retrieve investor information for a company including institutional, PE, and VC investors.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol or company name

investor_type.description: Type of investor: institutional, pe, vc, angel, or all

include_historical.description: Whether to include historical (exited) investors (default: false)

functions.name: get_funding_rounds
functions.description: Retrieve detailed funding round history including valuations, investors, and terms.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol or company name

round_type.description: Filter by round type: seed, series_a, series_b, growth, or all

functions.name: get_board_members
functions.description: Retrieve current and historical board of directors information.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol or company name

include_historical.description: Whether to include former board members (default: false)

include_affiliations.description: Whether to include other board affiliations (default: true)

functions.name: get_ownership
functions.description: Retrieve ownership structure and cap table data.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol or company name

ownership_type.description: Type of ownership data: institutional, insider, or all

as_of_date.description: Date for ownership snapshot in ISO format (e.g., 2024-12-31)
